zh.Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾維格萊斯沃斯
zh.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Sherburne於大約1425年出生在英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特時，她的父親Richard II Sherburne20歲，母親Alice de Hamerton14歲。她於1445年與Henry Rishton在英國藍卡爾利申頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1471年在英國藍卡爾利申頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾維格萊斯沃斯
zh-hans.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Sherburne于大约1425年出生在英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特时，她的父亲Richard II Sherburne20岁，母亲Alice de Hamerton14岁。她于1445年与Henry Rishton在英国藍卡爾利申頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1471年在英国藍卡爾利申頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sherburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called with Old English scīr ‘bright, clear’ + burna ‘stream’, including Sherburn in Elmet (Yorkshire), Sherburn (East Yorkshire, Durham), Shirburn (Oxfordshire), Sherborne (Dorset, Gloucestershire), Sherborne Saint John, Monk Sherborne (Hampshire), Sherbourne (Warwickshire), Sherbourne in Albury (Surrey), and Sherborne in Litton (Somerset). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sherbon
meanings: English: variant of Sherburne with loss of the second -r- by dissimilation. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Sherburne was born about 1425, in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard II Sherburne, was 20 and her mother, Alice de Hamerton, was 14. She married Henry Rishton in 1445, in Rishton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1471, in Rishton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Sherburne est née environ 1425, à Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard II Sherburne, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice de Hamerton, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Rishton en 1445, à Rishton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1471, à Rishton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Sherburne um 1425 in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard II Sherburne 20 und ihre Mutter Alice de Hamerton 14. Sie hat 1445 in Rishton, Lancashire, England Henry Rishton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1471 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Rishton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Sherburne è nata il circa 1425 nel Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Richard II Sherburne, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Alice de Hamerton, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Henry Rishton nel 1445, nel Rishton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1471, nel Rishton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルスト
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Sherburneが約1425年にイギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルストで生まれた時，父Richard II Sherburneは20歳，母Alice de Hamertonは14歳であった。1445年にイギリスランカシュアイアリシュトンでHenry Rishtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1471年にイギリスランカシュアイアリシュトンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Sherburne(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 랭카실르 스토니후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard II Sherburne(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Hamerton(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 랭카실르 리슈턴에서 Henry Rishton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 영국 랭카실르 리슈턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Sherburne nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard II Sherburne, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Hamerton, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Rishton em 1445, em Rishton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1471, em Rishton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Sherburne родилась около 1425 г. в местности стонихурст, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard II Sherburne было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Hamerton, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Rishton в 1445 г. в местности риштон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1471 г. в местности риштон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Sherburne nació aproximadamente 1425, en Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard II Sherburne, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice de Hamerton, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Henry Rishton en 1445, en Rishton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1471, en Rishton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
